events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: crane operations, outriggers not fully extended on mats. Work rough-complete. Need estimate measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Decision fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Risk high/critical? Outriggers not fully extended can cause crane instability/tipping. Critical maybe. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value? Measurable cue: visible enough to estimate whether within tolerance. We can set value 0 (not fully extended) or maybe percent extension e.g. 60%. The schema says value numeric reading or computed quantity. We can set value 0 indicating not fully extended. But maybe better value 0 (extension deficiency). Confidence 0.95. Findings: outriggers not fully extended per manufacturer/load chart; mats present but outriggers not deployed to required length; unstable setup. Actions: cease crane operations, fully extend outriggers per manufacturer and load chart, inspect setup, re-certify by competent person. Rationale: OSHA 1926.1400 requires outriggers be fully extended and set per manufacturer/load chart; partial extension reduces stability radius and capacity, risk of tip-over. References: OSHA 1926.1400, load charts, manufacturer procedures. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1926.1400 and crane load charts require outriggers to be fully extended and set as specified for the lift configuration. Partially retracted outriggers shrink the stability base and can overload the crane, creating a tip-over hazard. Because the observed condition is visible and non-compliant, the setup fails inspection.",

  ]
